title: Open Source Guide
subtitle: Find your first open source contribution
description: Search for good first issues in real GitHub projects. Filter by language, check project popularity, and start contributing today.
emptyText: Try changing the filters or searching for another term.
errorRateLimit: GitHub API rate limit reached. Wait a few minutes and try again. Without authentication, the limit is 10 searches per minute.
errorInvalidQuery: Invalid query. Check the filters (organization or repository may be incorrect).
errorConnection: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
resource1Desc: GitHub's official guide on open source contributions
resource2Desc: Interactive tutorial to make your first PR
resource3Desc: Good first issues aggregator by language
resource4Desc: Projects with issues tagged for beginners
resource5Desc: Receive issues by email from repos you choose
resource6Desc: Search issues by skill, language, and difficulty
tipsTitle: Tips to get your PR accepted
tip1Desc: Every project has its own rules. Follow them.
tip2Desc: Say you'll work on it to avoid duplicate effort.
tip3Desc: Don't mix bug fixes with refactoring.
tip4Desc: If the project has tests, add them for your changes.
tip5Desc: PRs under 200 lines get reviewed faster.
tip6Desc: If changes are requested, do them in 1-2 days.
footerText: Built to help beginners contribute to open source.
